title: Synthesis Recipes Used
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS runs FROM Synthesis WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT Name AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM Synthesis WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Name ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {runs} synthesis recipe(s) executed during the report period. Synthesis reveals your play habits more honestly than almost anything else — frequent SRV fuel synthesis means surface grinding, heatsink synthesis means deep neutron runs, and premium FSD injection synthesis means long-range boosting through explored space.
details.help: Synthesis Name is the recipe identifier (e.g. 'Heatsink:Standard', 'FSDinjection:Premium'). runs drives the title as the total synthesis sessions count.

tagLines: Synthesis recipe execution log compiled. Material expenditure via synthesis noted in the crafting record.
Synthesis is what you do when the resupply point is too far away. It tells you where you were operating.
The recipes you burn most are a map of your sessions. SRV fuel means surface work. Heatsinks mean trouble.
